entities.name: Sales as iterative rejection
entities.context: Sales framed as a repeated exercise in hearing 'no,' humbling oneself, and iterating until 'no' becomes 'yes'

entities.name: 30% close rate benchmark
entities.context: YC stat: even top companies only close ~30% of deals at demo stage; losing 7 out of 10 is normal for high performers

entities.name: Bootstrapped / funding-independent operating model
entities.context: Invoice Butler philosophy of avoiding dependency on venture funding, staying close to profitability, insisting customers pay before building
